place: Bang Rak, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Spacious Three-Bedroom Pool Villa with 10-Metre Pool, Bang Rak
blurb: A generous three-bedroom pool villa in Bang Rak with a striking dark-and-white palette, a ten-metre private pool and a poolside sala. 405 m² of single-storey living, minutes from Big Buddha Beach and Fisherman's Village. ฿13,200,000.
detail:
One of the larger homes in its Bang Rak enclave, this single-storey villa makes a confident statement in charcoal and white, wrapped around a ten-metre private pool and a shaded poolside sala. It spans 405 m² of built space on a 531 m² plot, close to Big Buddha Beach, Fisherman's Village and the airport.

The open living level pairs a dark designer kitchen with living and dining areas that open wide to the pool terrace. Three double bedrooms each have an en-suite bathroom and generous glazing, with air-conditioning throughout and the villa delivered fully furnished.

Outside, the long pool runs beside a lawn and a covered sala framed by bougainvillea and palms. The villa is held on a registered leasehold with approximately 26 years and 2 months remaining, running to September 2052. Lease terms, floor plan and inventory on request.
